movie.actors: Dennis Quaid, Bess Armstrong, Simon MacCorkindale, Louis Gossett Jr.
movie.plot: The sons of police chief Brody must protect customers at a SeaWorld theme park after a thirty-five-foot shark becomes trapped in the park with them.
movie.title: Jaws 3-D
movie.writer: Peter Benchley (suggested by the novel "Jaws"), Richard Matheson (screenplay), Carl Gottlieb (screenplay), Guerdon Trueblood (story)
